title: Supplies
description: Wholesale listings with tier pricing and minimum order quantities.
results: {count, plural, one {# wholesale listing} other {# wholesale listings}}

t2Notice.title: T2 verified sellers only
t2Notice.body: Wholesale supplies on Vergeo5 are listed by T2-verified businesses. Retail-only vendors cannot publish tier-priced listings.

empty.title: No wholesale listings yet
empty.body: Check back soon — verified suppliers are adding bulk stock with tier pricing.

gate.title: Business mode required
gate.body: Wholesale supplies with tier pricing are reserved for verified businesses. Enable business mode to browse and buy in bulk.
gate.signInBody: Sign in with a verified business account to view wholesale supplies.
gate.pendingBody: We're reviewing your business details. You'll get wholesale access as soon as you're verified.
gate.rejectedBody: We couldn't verify your business. Update your details and resubmit to unlock wholesale.
